texto: It begins with the natural feeling that one wants to serve, to serve first. Then conscious choice brings one to aspire to lead. That person is sharply different from one who is leader first, perhaps because ofthe need to assuage an unusual power drive.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Greenleaf sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “It begins with the natural feeling that one wants to serve, to serve first. Then conscious choice…” articula lideranca, leadership, reflexao em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
